creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
I do not use py-lucene myself, but searching a bit for "pylucene" and
"segmentation fault" turned up, for instance, the thread at [1]. Does the
procedure for initialization described there fix the problem for you?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.mail-archive.com/pylucene-dev@osafoundation.org/msg01507.html
